meta.subject: Social Studies
meta.rule: No learner-facing content is approved unless it is traceable to an approved source.

sourceTiers.3: Approved learner book or teacher guide

sources.title: Primary Seven Set One Curriculum PDF
sources.verificationNotes: Official NCDC URL was downloaded in workspace for extraction during 2026-07-15 session. Topic 1 pages 315-317 / printed pages 294-296 were extracted and used for evidence notes. Do not rely on unreferenced facts beyond extracted pages.

sources.title: In-repo P7 Social Studies curriculum map
sources.issuer: Tendo internal map derived from NCDC P7 Set One
sources.verificationNotes: Used for current app structure. Must be cross-checked against the NCDC PDF page references before premium-final status.

sources.title: P7 SST Topic 05 in-repo NCDC extract: People of Africa, Ethnic Groups and Settlement Patterns
sources.issuer: Tendo internal extract from NCDC source
sources.verificationNotes: Expected extract file is not present in current repo. Create/verify before rewriting Topic 5 under the new system.

sources.title: UNEB assessment-aligned references
sources.verificationNotes: Useful for assessment style only. Do not use as the sole source for syllabus content.

sources.title: P7 SST Topic 01 in-repo NCDC extract: Location of Africa on the Map of the World
sources.issuer: Tendo internal extract from NCDC P7 Set One PDF
sources.verificationNotes: Cross-checked on 2026-07-15 against NCDC PDF pages 315-317 / printed pages 294-296. Useful for Topic 1 evidence, but country/capital and island full lists still need additional verified source.

sources.title: UNSD Standard Country or Area Codes for Statistical Use (M49) — Africa regions
sources.verificationNotes: Official UN statistical region source. NCDC uses similar but not identical region language and separately lists Horn of Africa, so this must be adapted for P7, not copied blindly.

sources.title: Horn of Africa reference
sources.verificationNotes: Used only to support the common Horn of Africa grouping of Djibouti, Eritrea, Ethiopia and Somalia. NCDC names Horn of Africa but does not list its countries on the extracted Topic 1 pages.

sources.title: Current African capital city cross-check pack
sources.issuer: Multiple current reference sources including CIA World Factbook/Britannica/general country-capital references
sources.verificationNotes: Candidate countries/capitals/islands pack created for Topic 1. It is not yet approved for learner-facing publishing because capital changes and school-answer conventions need review.

sources.title: African island countries cross-check
sources.issuer: General geography references cross-checked with UN small island/developing state indicators where applicable
sources.verificationNotes: Candidate list of six independent African island countries: Cabo Verde, Comoros, Madagascar, Mauritius, São Tomé and Príncipe, Seychelles. Needs teacher/founder approval before publishing.

sources.title: Africa reference: Equator, Tropics and Prime Meridian
sources.verificationNotes: Supports map facts that Africa is cut by the Equator, lies largely in the tropical region between the Tropics of Cancer and Capricorn, and is crossed by the Prime Meridian. Used only to support NCDC Topic 1 major-line details.
